text: 🇺🇦 Fire in Priluki, Chernigov region after a drone strike Local channels report that one of the objects that was hit is a police station 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 切尔尼戈夫州普里卢基在无人机袭击后发生火灾。当地频道报道称，被击中的目标之一是警察局 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “It was Good Friday afternoon in a nearly empty West Wing soon after the president learned that an American jet had been shot down in Iran, with two airmen missing. Trump SCREAMED at aides for hours. "THE EUROPEANS AREN'T HELPING", he said repeatedly. – WSJ report 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “那是耶稣受难日的一个下午，西翼几乎空无一人。总统刚得知一架美国喷气式飞机在伊朗被击落，两名飞行员失踪。特朗普对助手们咆哮了几个小时。他反复说：‘欧洲人根本不帮忙’。”——《华尔街日报》报道 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Russia is not participating in the negotiations between the US and Iran but is ready to assist in reaching a peaceful settlement - Peskov 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 佩斯科夫表示，俄罗斯没有参与美伊谈判，但愿意协助达成和平解决方案 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran does not recognise “any deadlines or ultimatums” in securing its national interests. He states that safeguarding national interests will continue “for as long as necessary,” adding that any new…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ISNA: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said the U.S. proposal, which was conveyed to Tehran during the visit of Pakistan’s army chief, is under review. Details of the proposals mentioned in the media are not confirmable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里表示，伊朗不承认在维护国家利益方面的‘任何最后期限或最后通牒’。他指出，维护国家利益将‘在必要时持续进行’，并补充说任何新的……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ISNA：伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里表示，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长访问期间转达给德黑兰的美国提议正在审查中。媒体提到的提议细节无法证实。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: US officials say that despite public rhetoric, Washington and Tehran have made progress toward a deal since the first round of negotiations on April 12. They add that key issues remain unresolved, including Iran’s nuclear enrichment programme and the future of the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：美国官员表示，尽管有公开言论，但自4月12日第一轮谈判以来，华盛顿和德黑兰在达成协议方面取得了进展。他们补充说，关键问题仍未解决，包括伊朗的核浓缩计划和霍尔木兹海峡的未来。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated "In the event of an attack on Belarus, we, together with the Russian Federation, will use our entire arsenal, including nuclear weapons, as a warning to Ukraine, Poland, and the Baltic states." - Lukashenko. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “如果白俄罗斯遭到袭击，我们将与俄罗斯联邦一起使用我们的全部武库，包括核武器，以警告乌克兰、波兰和波罗的海国家。”——卢卡申科。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 A resident of Tuapse, a Russian woman, breaks down in tears after another Ukrainian strike on the port and oil refinery: 🗣️ “Damn it, I just wanted to live by the sea with my child. Now the sea is polluted with fuel… What am I even supposed to do here? These damn drones are flying around, destroying everything. You don’t even know if you’ll survive, if you or your child will wake up alive.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 一名图阿普谢的俄罗斯居民在乌克兰再次袭击该港口和炼油厂后泪流满面：🗣️ “该死，我只是想和我的孩子住在海边。现在海里全是燃料……我在这里还能做什么？这些该死的无人机到处飞，摧毁了一切。你甚至不知道自己能否活下来，不知道你或你的孩子是否还能活着醒来。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Preparations are underway for a meeting between Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and President Trump, expected "soon," according to Lebanon's MTV News. Netanyahu will not be part of the meeting. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046157411489108186/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据黎巴嫩MTV新闻报道，黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩与特朗普总统的会晤正在筹备中，预计“很快”举行。内塔尼亚胡将不会参加此次会晤。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046157411489108186/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ ✝️ 🇱🇧 An Israeli D9 operator recorded himself razing the Saint George shrine in the village of Yaroun during the invasion of southern Lebanon as another example of Zionism terrorism. Israel is the only entity in the history that has succeeded in destroying holy sites belonging to all 3 Abrahamic faiths, Judaism, Christianity, and Islam. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ ✝️ 🇱🇧 一名以色列D9推土机操作员录下了自己在入侵黎巴嫩南部期间夷平亚伦村圣乔治神龛的过程，这是犹太复国主义恐怖主义的又一例证。以色列是历史上唯一成功摧毁了所有三大亚伯拉罕宗教（犹太教、基督教和伊斯兰教）圣地的实体。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Iran shifts its stance: from outright rejecting a second round of talks to now saying no decision has been made on attending U.S. negotiations tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：伊朗改变了立场：从彻底拒绝第二轮会谈转变为现在表示尚未就参加美国谈判做出决定 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iraq's government revenues cover just half of its expenses, according to a government financial advisor. Al Mada reports 15-25% of investment liquidity could leave the country. ExxonMobil and BP are both reviewing their presence in Iraq. - Shafaq, Al Mada. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据政府财务顾问称，伊拉克政府的收入仅能覆盖其支出的一半。Al Mada报道称，15-25%的投资流动资金可能会流出该国。埃克森美孚和英国石油公司都在重新评估其在伊拉克的业务。- Shafaq, Al Mada. 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's army chief Gen. Asim Munir told President Trump that Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is an obstacle to peace talks, a Pakistani security source told Reuters. Trump told Munir he would consider his advice. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046155146703307099/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位巴基斯坦安全消息人士告诉路透社，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔将军告诉特朗普总统，伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁是和平谈判的障碍。特朗普告诉穆尼尔他会考虑他的建议。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046155146703307099/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated There is another fire at the Russian port of Tuapse. SBU drones have once again attacked the port and the oil refinery there. The Russians had only just managed to extinguish the fire from the previous attack, and now the blaze has spread to at least 11 different locations. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046154926779166897/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯图阿普谢港口再次发生火灾。乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）的无人机再次袭击了该港口和炼油厂。俄罗斯人刚设法扑灭了上次袭击引发的火灾，现在火势已蔓延至至少11个不同地点。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046154926779166897/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor A U.S. Space Command general warns Russia is considering placing a nuclear anti-satellite weapon in orbit that could disable up to 80% of satellites if detonated. (The Times) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046154068096151571/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位美国太空司令部将军警告称，俄罗斯正在考虑在轨道上部署核反卫星武器，如果引爆，可能会使多达80%的卫星失效。（《泰晤士报》） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046154068096151571/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @NOELreports : Russian milbloggers are more and more worried about increased Ukrainian drone attacks. "Current air defenses can no longer handle the scale of Ukrainian drone strikes. Without radical reform or shutting down production in Europe, major problems will emerge by year’s end.” #Ukraine tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @NOELreports：俄罗斯军事博主对乌克兰无人机袭击的增加越来越担忧。“目前的防空系统已无法应对乌克兰无人机袭击的规模。如果不进行彻底改革或关闭欧洲的生产，到今年年底将出现重大问题。” #乌克兰 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : So basically, countries are pushing for U.S. financial support, and if they don’t get it, they’ll look to China instead, putting pressure on the dollar. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor：所以基本上，各国都在推动美国的财政支持，如果得不到，他们就会转向中国，从而给美元带来压力。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 Two International Coalition helicopters Blackhawks were spotted flying above the southern part of Swaida Governorate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 两架国际联盟的黑鹰直升机被发现飞越苏韦达省南部上空。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 Reuters: A powerful earthquake of around “7.5 magnitude” struck off the northeastern coast of Japan, prompting a tsunami warning. Authorities warned of waves of up to “3 metres,” with evacuation alerts issued for coastal areas including Iwate, Aomori, and Hokkaido. The quake occurred at a shallow depth and disrupted transport, with bullet train services suspended as emergency measures were put in place. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 路透社：日本东北部海岸附近发生约“7.5级”强震，引发海啸预警。当局警告海浪高度可达“3米”，并对岩手县、青森县和北海道等沿海地区发布了疏散警报。地震震源深度较浅，导致交通中断，新干线服务暂停，紧急措施已启动。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran must be “more cautious of the enemy’s plots” during diplomatic processes, even more than in wartime. He states the United States has “twice in less than nine months betrayed diplomacy” during…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran does not recognise “any deadlines or ultimatums” in securing its national interests. He states that safeguarding national interests will continue “for as long as necessary,” adding that any new action by the United States or Israel would be met with a decisive response. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，伊朗在外交进程中必须比战时“更加警惕敌人的阴谋”。他指出，美国在不到九个月的时间里“两次背叛了外交”……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，伊朗不承认在维护国家利益方面的“任何最后期限或最后通牒”。他声明，维护国家利益的行动将“在必要时持续进行”，并补充说，美国或以色列的任何新行动都将遭到果断回击。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran Will Not Let Side Issues Distract from National Interests 🔹 Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesperson said the U.S. negotiating team admitted it was reporting to Israeli officials during or after the talks. 🔹 He stressed that no issue unrelated to the core negotiations will be allowed to divert focus from Iran’s national interests, adding that Iran remains committed to clear directives and defined positions. 🔹 He also said no decision has yet been made on whether, when, or how the next round of negotiations will take place. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗不会让次要问题分散对国家利益的关注 🔹 伊朗外交部发言人表示，美国谈判团队承认在会谈期间或会谈后向以色列官员进行了汇报。 🔹 他强调，绝不允许任何与核心谈判无关的问题分散对伊朗国家利益的关注，并补充说，伊朗仍致力于明确的指令和既定的立场。 🔹 他还表示，关于下一轮谈判是否、何时或如何进行，目前尚未做出任何决定。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 As long as the ceasefire is violated and Iranian ports and ships are threatened, normal transit through the Strait of Hormuz cannot be discussed 🔹 The Foreign Ministry spokesperson said the ceasefire has faced repeated U.S. violations, along with threats against Iranian ports and vessels. 🔹 He said normal traffic through the Strait cannot resume under these conditions, as ships, cargo owners, and insurers remain concerned about the risks. 🔹 He added that Iran cannot allow such a situation to happen again. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 只要停火协议遭到破坏，伊朗的港口和船只受到威胁，就无法讨论霍尔木兹海峡的正常通行问题。🔹 外交部发言人表示，停火协议多次遭到美国破坏，伊朗的港口和船只也面临威胁。🔹 他表示，在这种情况下，海峡的正常通行无法恢复，因为船只、货主和保险公司仍然担心风险。🔹 他补充说，伊朗不能允许这种情况再次发生。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Christians Decry Zionist IDF Soldier Smashing Jesus Statue in Lebanon Christians are outraged after a picture of Israeli soldier smashing Jesus statue in Lebanon surfaced online, confirmed by the IDF. The incident has intensified concerns over decades of Zionist hate crime on Christians & subsequent Christian exhodus, amid ongoing conflict. READ MORE
text_zh: 基督徒谴责犹太复国主义以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩砸毁耶稣雕像。在网上出现一张以色列士兵在黎巴嫩砸毁耶稣雕像的照片并得到以色列国防军证实后，基督徒感到愤怒。在持续的冲突中，这一事件加剧了人们对几十年来犹太复国主义者针对基督徒的仇恨犯罪以及随后的基督徒外逃的担忧。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 Taiwan’s Defense Ministry says China’s PLA Navy aircraft carrier Liaoning transited the Taiwan Strait, adding that its armed forces monitored the situation and responded. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 台湾国防部称，中国人民解放军海军辽宁号航空母舰穿越台湾海峡，并补充说其武装部队已监视局势并作出应对。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran must be “more cautious of the enemy’s plots” during diplomatic processes, even more than in wartime. He states the United States has “twice in less than nine months betrayed diplomacy” during negotiations, accusing it of attacks that violated international law and targeted Iran. Baghaei adds that Washington continues to insist on “unreasonable and unrealistic positions,” warning that repeating past approaches will not yield different results. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，在外交进程中，伊朗必须比战时“更加警惕敌人的阴谋”。他指出，美国在谈判期间“在不到九个月的时间里两次背叛外交”，并指责其发动了违反国际法并针对伊朗的袭击。巴盖里补充说，华盛顿继续坚持“不合理和不切实际的立场”，并警告说重复过去的方法不会产生不同的结果。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 We are not optimistic about the negotiations — we are realistic. 🔹 Responding to a question about conflicting U.S. statements and the chances of successful talks, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson said Iran is not optimistic, but realistic. 🔹 He said decades of experience have made Iran deeply cautious toward U.S. policies. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 我们对谈判并不乐观——我们是现实的。🔹 在回答关于美国相互矛盾的声明和谈判成功机会的问题时，外交部发言人表示，伊朗并不乐观，而是现实的。🔹 他说，几十年的经验使伊朗对美国的政策保持高度警惕。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 All branches of the state will take the necessary steps to protect national interests and preserve achievements 🔹 Responding to a question about the proposed Strait of Hormuz management law, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson said all parts of the Iranian state — including parliament, the Supreme National Security Council, the armed forces, and the Foreign Ministry — will each act in ways that safeguard the nation’s interests and consolidate its gains. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 国家各部门将采取必要措施保护国家利益并维护成果。🔹 在回答关于拟议的霍尔木兹海峡管理法的问题时，外交部发言人表示，伊朗国家的所有部门——包括议会、最高国家安全委员会、武装部队和外交部——都将各自采取行动，以维护国家利益并巩固其成果。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery overnight, igniting the tank farm. Russian officials reported one dead and one injured, marking the second hit on the Rosneft site in under a week. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂，点燃了储油罐区。俄罗斯官员报告称有一人死亡、一人受伤，这是不到一周内该俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）设施第二次遭到袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UAE Foreign Ministry: The UAE sustained 2,819+ missile and drone attacks from Iran during the war, including 537 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2,256 drones. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046151340674498722/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：阿联酋外交部：阿联酋在战争期间遭受了伊朗超过2819次导弹和无人机袭击，包括537枚弹道导弹、26枚巡航导弹和2256架无人机。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046151340674498722/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Footage from Gaza reportedly shows the elimination of a Hamas militant by an IDF sniper. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046150768948900321/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据报道，来自加沙的视频显示一名哈马斯武装分子被以色列国防军狙击手消灭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046150768948900321/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 A 7.4 magnitude earthquake struck northern Japan, triggering a tsunami warning. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：突发 🔴 日本北部发生7.4级地震，引发海啸预警。推文

text: WarMonitor Tsunami waves are reported to have reached Miyako in Iwate Prefecture. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：据报道，海啸波已到达岩手县宫古市。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Islamic regime Spokesman of the Central Khatam al-Anbiya Headquarters: “Following the blatant aggression by U.S. terrorist commandos against an Iranian commercial vessel in the waters of the Sea of Oman, the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran were prepared for a decisive response against the invading American forces. However, due to the presence of some families of the crew members of the aforementioned ship, they faced restrictions in order to preserve the lives and safety of those who were in danger every moment. In light of the prevailing circumstances, following confirmation of the safety of the families and crew of the ship violated by America, the powerful armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran will carry out the necessary action against the terrorist army of America.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新 🔴 伊斯兰政权哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）中央总部发言人：“在美国恐怖突击队在阿曼湾水域对一艘伊朗商船进行公然侵略后，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队已准备好对入侵的美国军队进行果断回击。然而，由于上述船只船员的一些家属在场，为了保护那些时刻处于危险之中的人的生命和安全，他们面临限制。鉴于当前情况，在确认被美国侵犯的船只上的家属和船员安全后，伊朗伊斯兰共和国强大的武装部队将对美国的恐怖军队采取必要行动。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Footage reportedly shows a strike on a vehicle in Gaza. All occupants were eliminated. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046148871064076765/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据报道，视频显示加沙的一辆车辆遭到袭击。所有乘员均被消灭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046148871064076765/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @JulianRoepcke : Not good: Russian troops are now operating 7 km south of Vovchansk, specifically in Symynivka. Geolocation by @Bielitzling . https://twitter.com/JulianRoepcke/status/2046141152353493175/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：转发 @JulianRoepcke：情况不妙：俄罗斯军队目前正在沃夫昌斯克（Vovchansk）以南7公里处行动，具体是在西米尼夫卡（Symynivka）。由 @Bielitzling 进行地理定位。https://twitter.com/JulianRoepcke/status/2046141152353493175/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior Iranian official says Tehran will not negotiate over its defense capabilities, including its missile program, noting that core nuclear disagreements remain unresolved and that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is complicating talks. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位伊朗高级官员表示，德黑兰不会就其防御能力（包括导弹计划）进行谈判，并指出核心核分歧仍未解决，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁使谈判变得复杂。推文

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 7.4 magnitude earthquake off the east coast of Honshu, Japan. No tsunami threat to the U.S. or Canadian west coast. Rising wave heights reported offshore of northern Japan following a 7.4 magnitude earthquake. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：更新 🔴 日本本州东海岸外发生7.4级地震。美国或加拿大西海岸没有海啸威胁。据报道，日本北部近海在7.4级地震后浪高上升。- 开源情报 推文

text: WarMonitor China’s Foreign Ministry says joint U.S., Japan, and Philippines military drills risk “confrontation,” warning outside forces in the Asia-Pacific could undermine regional trust and stability. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046147189571813657/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：中国外交部表示，美国、日本和菲律宾的联合军事演习有引发“对抗”的风险，并警告称亚太地区的外部势力可能会破坏区域信任与稳定。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046147189571813657/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Rising wave heights reported offshore of northern Japan following a 7.4 magnitude earthquake. 7.4 magnitude earthquake hits northern Japan. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据报道，日本北部近海在7.4级地震后浪高上升。日本北部发生7.4级地震。- 开源情报 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @NWS_NTWC : Tsunami Info Stmt: M7.4 Off East Coast Of Honshu, Japan 0053PDT Apr 20: Tsunami NOT expected; CA,OR,WA,BC,and AK tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：转发 @NWS_NTWC：海啸信息声明：日本本州东海岸外发生7.4级地震，太平洋夏令时间4月20日00:53：预计不会发生海啸；加利福尼亚州、俄勒冈州、华盛顿州、不列颠哥伦比亚省和阿拉斯加州。推文

text: Open Source Intel 7.4 magnitude earthquake hits northern Japan. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：日本北部发生7.4级地震。推文

text: WarMonitor A tsunami has been detected offshore as of 17:16 local time. A 7.4 magnitude earthquake has struck off northeastern Japan, with authorities warning of possible tsunami waves up to 3 meters along parts of Iwate and Hokkaido. - WarMonitor tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：截至当地时间17:16，近海已检测到海啸。日本东北部近海发生7.4级地震，当局警告岩手县和北海道部分地区可能出现高达3米的海啸波。- WarMonitor 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : When you have to kick the President of the United States out of the room in order to carry out a dangerous rescue, it’s time to kick him out of office too. When President Donald Trump learned that two American pilots had gone missing in Iran on Good Friday, he “screamed at aides for hours” and was then “kept out of the room” while his team was given minute-by-minute updates, according to the WSJ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：转发 @TheWarMonitor：当你为了进行危险的救援而不得不把美国总统赶出房间时，也是时候把他赶出办公室了。据《华尔街日报》报道，当唐纳德·特朗普总统得知两名美国飞行员在耶稣受难日在伊朗失踪时，他“对助手尖叫了几个小时”，随后在团队获得实时更新时被“挡在房间外”。https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran will not negotiate over its defensive capabilities. 🔹 Responding to a question about possible talks in Pakistan and whether Iran might offer concessions, including on its missile program, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson described the suggestion as strange and stressed that Iran will not negotiate over its defense capabilities. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗不会就其防御能力进行谈判。🔹 在回答关于巴基斯坦可能进行的会谈以及伊朗是否可能做出让步（包括导弹计划）的问题时，外交部发言人称这种建议很奇怪，并强调伊朗不会就其防御能力进行谈判。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Confusion among U.S. officials has harmed the diplomatic process. 🔹 Responding to a question about the U.S. Vice President’s role in negotiations, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson said internal disputes strongly influence the behavior of American officials. 🔹 He said many people in the United States oppose their government’s unlawful actions, pointing to protests and criticism from public figures and media. 🔹 According to him, contradictory statements and confusing behavior by U.S. officials are outward signs of those internal conflicts. He added that this has been a major factor undermining diplomacy over the past year and a half. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国官员之间的困惑损害了外交进程。🔹 在回答有关美国副总统在谈判中扮演角色的问题时，外交部发言人表示，内部争端严重影响了美国官员的行为。🔹 他说，美国国内有许多人反对其政府的非法行为，并指出了公众人物和媒体的抗议与批评。🔹 据他所称，美国官员前后矛盾的言论和令人困惑的行为是这些内部冲突的外部表现。他补充说，这是过去一年半以来破坏外交的主要因素。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Pakistan is currently the only mediator between Iran and the U.S. 🔹 Responding to a question about mediation efforts, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson said Pakistan is the only country currently leading the process, though others have also offered assistance. 🔹 He said the United States had betrayed the diplomatic process in recent months and over the past year. According to him, such actions also damage the credibility of the mediator. 🔹 He added that this harms not only the mediating country, but also international law and institutions meant for the peaceful resolution of disputes. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦目前是伊朗与美国之间唯一的调解人。🔹 在回答有关调解努力的问题时，外交部发言人表示，巴基斯坦是目前唯一主导该进程的国家，尽管其他国家也提供了协助。🔹 他说，美国在近几个月和过去一年中背叛了外交进程。据他所称，此类行为也损害了调解人的信誉。🔹 他补充说，这不仅损害了调解国，也损害了旨在和平解决争端的国际法和国际机构。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The Foreign Ministry takes no action without coordination with higher authorities. 🔹 Responding to criticism over the Foreign Minister’s tweet on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, the spokesperson said Iran’s Foreign Ministry does not act independently and all major decisions are made in coordination with the relevant state authorities. 🔹 He said the tweet by Araghchi was part of an understanding reached after the Lebanon ceasefire announcement. 🔹 According to him, Iran was set to fulfill its prior commitments regarding the Strait of Hormuz. This was not a new deal, but the implementation of an earlier agreement that was delayed due to ceasefire violations in Lebanon and the failure of the United States to uphold its commitments. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 外交部在未与上级协调的情况下不采取任何行动。🔹 在回应关于外交部长关于重开霍尔木兹海峡推文的批评时，发言人表示，伊朗外交部不会独立行事，所有重大决策均与相关国家当局协调后做出。🔹 他说，阿拉格齐的推文是在黎巴嫩停火声明宣布后达成的谅解的一部分。🔹 据他所称，伊朗准备履行其先前关于霍尔木兹海峡的承诺。这不是一项新协议，而是对早先协议的执行，该协议因黎巴嫩停火协议遭破坏以及美国未能履行其承诺而推迟。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The Foreign Ministry spokesperson, responding to a question about whether Iran would set preconditions for the next round of talks, including the possible lifting of the naval blockade, said: “You may call it a precondition or a condition, but our position is clear and reasonable. Our basis is Iran’s national interests. We demand nothing beyond Iran’s lawful rights and interests, and we will not allow them to be undermined by the bullying of others.” 🔹 Regarding the current situation, he said Iran is facing multiple ceasefire violations. During the period when the pause was supposed to be in effect, violations have occurred in Lebanon, the so-called naval blockade of Iran has been raised, and a commercial ship has been attacked. 🔹 He said all of these actions are blatant violations of international law, the United Nations Charter, and a clear breach of the ceasefire. He concluded: “Under such circumstances, the real question is how anyone can trust the U.S. claim of reconciliation and diplomacy.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 外交部发言人在回答关于伊朗是否会为下一轮谈判设定先决条件（包括可能解除海上封锁）的问题时表示：“你可以称之为先决条件或条件，但我们的立场是明确且合理的。我们的基础是伊朗的国家利益。我们不要求超出伊朗合法权利和利益的任何东西，我们也不会允许它们被他人的霸凌所破坏。” 🔹 关于当前局势，他表示伊朗正面临多次停火违规行为。在停火本应生效的期间，黎巴嫩发生了违规行为，所谓的对伊朗的海上封锁被提出，且一艘商船遭到袭击。🔹 他说，所有这些行为都是对国际法、《联合国宪章》的公然违反，也是对停火协议的明确破坏。他总结道：“在这种情况下，真正的问题是，还有谁能相信美国关于和解与外交的声明。”

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The Foreign Ministry spokesperson said that Iran’s only true security guarantor is its own people. He added that all countries are obligated under the United Nations Charter and international law to uphold their responsibilities, with permanent members of the UN Security Council bearing even greater responsibility. He thanked Russia and China for vetoing what he described as an anti-peace resolution detached from reality. He said Iran remains in close contact with both countries and believes the international community must hold the United States and the “Zionist regime” accountable for serious violations in the region. According to him, this can be pursued through the United Nations, the Security Council, as well as regional blocs such as BRICS and the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人表示，伊朗唯一真正的安全保障是其人民。他补充说，根据《联合国宪章》和国际法，所有国家都有义务履行其责任，联合国安理会常任理事国承担的责任更大。他感谢俄罗斯和中国否决了他所描述的脱离现实的反和平决议。他说，伊朗与两国保持密切联系，并认为国际社会必须追究美国和“犹太复国主义政权”在地区严重违规行为的责任。据他称，这可以通过联合国、安理会以及金砖国家和上海合作组织等区域集团来实现。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
